ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot interacting with an imaginary calendar.  The movement will suggest looking at, then pointing at, the calendar. Frame 1 will show both arms initially relaxed at the sides. Frame 2 shows the left arm reaching up and slightly forward, as if to retrieve the calendar. Frame 3 shows the left arm holding the imaginary calendar, with the hand slightly angled to suggest holding an object. Frame 4 shows the right arm extending forward in a pointing gesture at a specific date on the calendar.  Frame 5 shows the robot returning to a relaxed posture, suggesting completion of the calendar viewing action.

frames.beat: left arm reaches up as if for a calendar
left hand holds the calendar, right arm rests
right arm points to a date on the calendar
both arms return to a relaxed state
